response:
The rapper on the song "Wij zijn Ajax" who plays for the Turkish club Beşiktaş is **Ryan Babel**. 

This is evident from the context, which states:  
*"The single was released online as a digital download on SPEC Entertainment, the label owned by popular Dutch rapper Ali B., while the video clip was frequently aired on television at the time of the release. The song also features rap parts from Darryl, RB Djan and Ryan Babel."*
